summary: Projectile/combat-effect subsystem: ring/ground projectiles with byte-array timeline, held/body-attached projectiles, homing tracking, hit collision handler, guard prediction, counter-hit throw spawn.

functions.projectile_fade_cb: Generic effect fade: decrement alpha each frame, TASK_END when 0
functions.projectile_frame_update: Check x_b842de24 frame table, spawn sub-projectiles at matched frames
functions.projectile_init: Init projectile from attack state: read move state's projectile table index, set up frame_update callback
functions.projectile_null_cb: No-op callback for guard projectiles with no active effect
functions.projectile_hit_dispatch: Hit collision dispatch: route to guard callback or hit effect spawn
functions.projectile_end: Projectile cleanup: clear player flag, check character type for special cleanup
functions.projectile_ring_update: Ring projectile update (bone-attached model): read animation frame table, apply velocity, handle fade
functions.projectile_homing_update: Homing/pursuit projectile update: follow target, handle gravity, fade, model switching, shadow mode
functions.projectile_hit_spawn: Spawn hit effect object on projectile collision: create child projectile, set flags
functions.projectile_guard_spawn: Spawn guard prediction indicator: create fade-out object at offset position
functions.projectile_special_check: Character-specific projectile init: Sono's guard ring tracking
functions.projectile_spawn: Core projectile spawner: create Object from x_6fc0b62f effect data (ring or homing type), set velocity, rotation, light, flags
functions.guard_prediction_check: Check if opponent would guard the incoming hit via hit_outcome
functions.projectile_homing_setup: Set up homing activate/deactivate flags, spawn indicator effect
functions.projectile_guard_homing: NON_EQUIVALENT: guard ring homing logic — distance check, angle check, guard break activation
functions.projectile_impact_check: Detect projectile impact with opponent: collision range check, guard prediction, spawn hit effect

subsystems: Ring projectiles: timeline-based sub-effect spawning, homing tracking
Held projectiles: body-attached, bone-linked, frame counter, global flag
open_questions: sProjectileTypeTable — unused table of 2 update fn pointers?
x_6fc0b62f effect descriptor — exact field meanings
